phases.name: Weight Training
phases.goal: Trainer-assigned session from Candice. Focus on controlled movement and full range of motion on every rep.

tip.label: Form tip:
tip.text: Keep your core braced and control the movement — avoid swinging the leg. Full extension at the top.

tip.label: Form tip:
tip.text: Squeeze the glute hard at the top of each rep. Keep hips square — don't rotate to get extra range.

tip.label: Heels elevated:
tip.text: Elevating the heels increases quad and glute activation. Drive knees out and keep chest tall through the whole rep.

tip.label: Form tip:
tip.text: Full squeeze at peak contraction every rep. Control the eccentric — don't let it drop.

cards.title: Static Stretching — 5 min
cards.desc: Hip flexors, glutes, hamstrings. Hold each stretch 30–45 seconds.

cards.title: Protein Window
cards.desc: Hit your protein goal within 30–60 min post-session to kickstart recovery.
